title: Laundry Sign - Laundry Room Wall Decor, Washing Accessories, 30x20CM Oval Wooden Sign with Hemp Rope, Vintage Humorous "Drop Your Pants Here" & "Open 24 Hours" Design, Rustic Farmhouse Signs Wash
features: RUSTIC WOODEN CONSTRUCTION – Made from durable, natural wood with a smooth white finish and black detailing, this laundry room sign (30x20cm) combines sturdiness with vintage charm.
HUMOROUS & FUNCTIONAL DESIGN – Features playful text like "Drop Your Pants Here" and practical info ("25 PER LOAD"), making it ideal laundry room wall decor that entertains while informing.
EASY TO HANG – Includes pre-attached hemp rope for effortless installation on laundry doors, walls, or laundry room cabinets—no tools required.
CLEAR & DURABLE PRINT – Text and borders are engraved/printed for long-lasting visibility, perfect for high-traffic laundry room accessories.
VERSATILE DECOR – Works as large laundry sign for homes, apartments, or laundrettes. The black-and-white scheme suits vintage room decor styles.
description: Add Character to Your Laundry Space with This Charming Sign! This oval wooden laundry sign (30x20x0.5cm) blends utility and wit. The crisp black text on a white background ensures readability, while the cheeky phrasing ("Drop Your Pants Here") adds a lighthearted touch to chore day. Key Features: ✔ Material: Solid wood with polished edges and fade-resistant printing. ✔ Design: "OPEN 24 HOURS self-service," "Laundry ROOM," and pricing details in a classic font. ✔ Hanging: Natural hemp rope complements farmhouse or industrial decor. ✔ Durability: Resists moisture and daily wear—wipe clean with a damp cloth. Why Customers Love It: Functional & Fun: Unlike bland laundry room accessories , this sign entertains while directing users. Space Enhancer: Elevates laundry room wall decor with its minimalist vintage aesthetic. Gift-Ready: A unique housewarming or apartment-warming present for laundry haters. Perfect For: Laundry rooms in homes or shared spaces Basement or utility room wall decor Gifts paired with other laundry accessories Adding humor to mundane chores
